performance_overview: Through 9 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull has completed only 3 trades and 0 clean signal-driven wins: trade 1 = 06-04 MPC long (-0.25%, stopped ~1 min after entry on a too-tight ultra-low-ATR stop), trade 2 = 06-05 corrective buy-to-cover of the unintended -18 MPC short from the 06-04 double-sell (+0.54%), trade 3 = 06-10 CIEN long (-1.68%, a failed-bounce stop-out ~21 min after entry). The win-rate buckets are still pure noise (1-2 genuine signal trades). Today (06-11) was a disciplined NO-TRADE cash day: Bull flat $0.00 / 0.00% while SPY rallied +1.77%, so -1.77% relative on the day. Cumulative since inception: Bull -0.0766% vs SPY -2.67% -- still ahead, but the gap narrowed sharply from ~-4% as today's SPY rally exposed the cost of sitting in cash on strong up days. Trend over last 5 sessions: four flat no-trade days, one small losing trade (CIEN), then today flat again -- selectivity remains the only realized edge, but it is increasingly a cash-drag edge rather than a trading edge.
overnight_hold_insights: Still ZERO genuine overnight holds completed across all 9 sessions. The overnight_holds.closed_eod bucket reads 3 trades / 1W / 33.3% / avg -0.58% but is contaminated -- all three are intraday/EOD closes (06-04 MPC long, 06-05 corrective short-cover, 06-10 CIEN stop-out), none a real carry-overnight outcome. No gap-risk data exists yet. Carry-decision policy unchanged: apply the 6 config safe-hold gates (profitable, trailing stop active, price > EMA-21, no earnings within 2 days, sentiment not negative, gap-risk cushion). Standing lesson: low-ATR or red/gap-down names that don't extend within the session are correctly closed/stopped rather than carried.
